disclaimer: Educational protocols, not medical advice. Nutrient targets are general adult guidance with stated rationale.

root_causes.name: Patellar tendinopathy (tendon overload)
root_causes.diagnostic: Pain just below the kneecap; worse with jumping, stairs, deep squats.

vitamin_c_mg.why: cofactor for prolyl/lysyl hydroxylase in collagen crosslinking

glycine_g.why: most abundant amino acid in collagen

prescription.detail: 3×/week, 3–4 sets, tempo 3-0-3, 6–8 reps at heavy load; pain ≤4/10 during and settled by next morning.

root_causes.name: Early osteoarthritis (cartilage wear)
root_causes.diagnostic: Stiffness after rest, aching with load, sometimes crepitus; age 40+.

vitamin_c_mg.why: cofactor for prolyl/lysyl hydroxylase in collagen crosslinking

glycine_g.why: most abundant amino acid in collagen

prescription.detail: Build quadriceps strength (leg press, wall sits) 2–3×/week; low-impact conditioning to offload the joint.

root_causes.name: Weak posterior chain / deconditioning
root_causes.diagnostic: Dull ache with prolonged sitting or bending; eases with movement.

prescription.detail: Daily core endurance (bird-dog, side plank, curl-up); hip-hinge strength (RDL, hip thrust) 2–3×/week.

root_causes.name: Poor motor control / core stability
root_causes.diagnostic: Recurrent "tweaks" with sudden or loaded movements.

prescription.detail: Pallof press, dead bug, planks — train the core to resist motion before adding load.

root_causes.name: Upper-cross posture (desk/phone)
root_causes.diagnostic: Tight upper traps, rounded shoulders, tension headaches.

prescription.detail: Strengthen deep neck flexors + lower traps (chin tucks, face pulls, Y-raises); open thoracic spine daily.

root_causes.name: Rotator-cuff impingement
root_causes.diagnostic: Painful arc lifting the arm overhead; night pain on that shoulder.

vitamin_c_mg.why: cofactor for prolyl/lysyl hydroxylase in collagen crosslinking

glycine_g.why: most abundant amino acid in collagen

prescription.detail: External-rotation and scapular work daily at low load; avoid painful overhead loading until controlled.

root_causes.name: Glute weakness / hip instability
root_causes.diagnostic: Lateral hip ache, poor single-leg control, knee caves in on squats.

prescription.detail: Clamshells, monster walks, hip thrusts, single-leg work 3×/week.

root_causes.name: Tendon overuse (tennis/golfer elbow)
root_causes.diagnostic: Pain at the outer/inner elbow with gripping or lifting.

vitamin_c_mg.why: cofactor for prolyl/lysyl hydroxylase in collagen crosslinking

glycine_g.why: most abundant amino acid in collagen

prescription.detail: Heavy isometrics for pain relief, then slow eccentric wrist work daily; load management.

root_causes.name: Achilles tendinopathy
root_causes.diagnostic: Morning stiffness and pain at the heel-cord; worse with running.

vitamin_c_mg.why: cofactor for prolyl/lysyl hydroxylase in collagen crosslinking

glycine_g.why: most abundant amino acid in collagen

prescription.detail: Eccentric heel drops (straight + bent knee) daily, progressing load over 12 weeks.

root_causes.name: Anabolic resistance + low protein (aging)
root_causes.diagnostic: Losing strength/muscle with age; low protein intake; less activity.

prescription.detail: Full-body resistance 2–3×/week; 1.6–2.2 g/kg protein spread across meals with ~2.5 g leucine each.

root_causes.name: Poor glucose disposal / inactivity
root_causes.diagnostic: Rising fasting glucose or HbA1c, post-meal energy crashes.

prescription.detail: Resistance training + post-meal walks; build muscle to soak up glucose.

root_causes.name: Visceral adiposity driving resistance
root_causes.diagnostic: Central/belly fat, high waist circumference.

protein_g.why: preserves lean mass in a deficit + satiety

prescription.detail: Moderate energy deficit, high protein/fiber, daily steps; resistance to protect lean mass.

root_causes.name: Chronic energy surplus
root_causes.diagnostic: Gradual central weight gain; more calories in than out.

protein_g.why: preserves lean mass in a deficit + satiety

prescription.detail: ~300–500 kcal deficit, 8–10k steps, resistance 3×/week to keep muscle.

root_causes.name: Cortisol / stress-driven storage
root_causes.diagnostic: Stress eating, poor sleep, fat gain despite "eating okay".

protein_g.why: preserves lean mass in a deficit + satiety

prescription.detail: Prioritise sleep and stress load; avoid crushing cardio that raises cortisol further.

root_causes.name: Low iron / anemia
root_causes.diagnostic: Tired, breathless on exertion, pale; heavy periods or low intake.

magnesium_mg.why: ATP is biologically active as Mg-ATP

prescription.detail: Check ferritin; pair iron-rich foods with vitamin C; avoid coffee/tea with iron meals.

root_causes.name: Mitochondrial inefficiency
root_causes.diagnostic: Persistent low energy despite adequate sleep and iron.

magnesium_mg.why: ATP is biologically active as Mg-ATP

prescription.detail: Zone-2 cardio to build mitochondrial density; support with CoQ10/creatine.

root_causes.name: Blood-sugar swings
root_causes.diagnostic: Strong cravings 2–3h after carb-heavy meals; energy rollercoaster.

prescription.detail: Lead meals with protein + fiber; avoid naked carbs; walk after eating.

root_causes.name: Sluggish thyroid / nutrient deficits
root_causes.diagnostic: Cold, fatigue, weight gain, dry skin; consider TSH testing.

prescription.detail: Thyroid meds are prescription — confirm labs with a doctor; ensure iodine/selenium/zinc sufficiency.

root_causes.name: Endothelial dysfunction + sodium/potassium imbalance
root_causes.diagnostic: Elevated readings; high-sodium diet; low fruit/veg.

prescription.detail: Cut sodium, raise potassium (veg/fruit), aerobic exercise most days.

root_causes.name: High LDL / low soluble fiber
root_causes.diagnostic: Elevated LDL on labs; low fiber, high saturated fat intake.

prescription.detail: Soluble fiber (oats, legumes), replace sat-fat with unsaturated, aerobic exercise.

root_causes.name: Neuroinflammation / poor metabolic control
root_causes.diagnostic: Cloudy thinking, worse after poor sleep or high-sugar meals.

omega3_mg.why: DHA is structural in neuronal membranes

prescription.detail: Fix sleep and glycemic swings first; aerobic exercise for cerebral blood flow.

root_causes.name: Low GABAergic tone / over-arousal
root_causes.diagnostic: Racing thoughts, tension, trouble winding down.

prescription.detail: Zone-2 cardio, breathing/mobility work, magnesium; L-theanine for acute calm.

root_causes.name: Low monoamines + inflammation
root_causes.diagnostic: Persistent low mood, anhedonia, low drive.

prescription.detail: Regular aerobic + resistance exercise has antidepressant effect; seek care for persistent symptoms.

root_causes.name: Low dopaminergic drive / distractibility
root_causes.diagnostic: Difficulty sustaining attention, task-switching, motivation dips.

omega3_mg.why: DHA is structural in neuronal membranes

prescription.detail: Morning exercise and protein; caffeine+theanine stack; clinical assessment for ADHD.

root_causes.name: Cholinergic / vascular decline
root_causes.diagnostic: Word-finding, forgetfulness with age; cardiovascular risk factors.

omega3_mg.why: DHA is structural in neuronal membranes

prescription.detail: Aerobic fitness protects the brain; novel learning; manage BP and glucose.

root_causes.name: HPA-axis dysregulation
root_causes.diagnostic: Exhaustion, cynicism, "wired but tired", poor recovery.

prescription.detail: Reduce total load, protect sleep, gentle movement; adaptogens support the stress response.

root_causes.name: Circadian misalignment / hyperarousal
root_causes.diagnostic: Can't switch off at night; late light/screen exposure.

prescription.detail: Morning light, dim evenings, consistent wake time; low-dose melatonin 30–60 min before bed.

root_causes.name: Nighttime cortisol / glucose swings
root_causes.diagnostic: Wake at 3–4am, hard to fall back asleep.

prescription.detail: Avoid alcohol and late sugar; magnesium/glycine; manage stress load.

root_causes.name: Circadian desynchrony
root_causes.diagnostic: Rotating shifts or travel; body clock out of phase.

prescription.detail: Strategic light exposure, timed melatonin to shift the clock, caffeine early in the shift only.

root_causes.name: Lifestyle-suppressed testosterone
root_causes.diagnostic: Low drive, fatigue, poor recovery; overweight, poor sleep, high stress.

prescription.detail: Heavy resistance training, fix sleep and body-fat, ensure zinc/vit-D/magnesium before considering TRT.

root_causes.name: Primary hypogonadism (clinical)
root_causes.diagnostic: Confirmed low T on repeat morning labs with symptoms.

prescription.detail: TRT/enclomiphene are prescription — requires physician workup and monitoring.

root_causes.name: Estrogen decline
root_causes.diagnostic: Hot flushes, sleep disruption, mood and bone changes.

prescription.detail: Resistance & impact training for bone/muscle; HRT is a physician decision.

root_causes.name: Vascular / hormonal / stress
root_causes.diagnostic: Reduced desire or performance; overlaps with stress, sleep, blood flow.

prescription.detail: Cardiovascular fitness, address stress/sleep, ensure testosterone status; PDE-5 is prescription.

root_causes.name: Low bone mineral density
root_causes.diagnostic: Low DEXA score, fracture risk, post-menopausal or low intake.

prescription.detail: Progressive resistance + impact + balance; ensure calcium/vit-D/protein.

root_causes.name: Insulin resistance + high androgens
root_causes.diagnostic: Irregular cycles, weight gain, acne, hair changes.

protein_g.why: preserves lean mass in a deficit + satiety

prescription.detail: Resistance training + fiber/protein; inositol/berberine to improve insulin sensitivity.

root_causes.name: Collagen loss + glycation
root_causes.diagnostic: Fine lines, loss of firmness, dullness with age/UV/sugar.

prescription.detail: Daily sunscreen, topical retinoid, collagen + vitamin C; limit sugar to reduce glycation.

root_causes.name: UV / oxidative damage
root_causes.diagnostic: Sun spots, photoaging, uneven tone.

root_causes.name: Sebum + insulin/androgen-driven
root_causes.diagnostic: Oily skin, breakouts along jaw/chin; worse with high-glycemic diet.

prescription.detail: Reduce high-GI foods and dairy if triggering; zinc; topical retinoid/niacinamide.

root_causes.name: DHT-sensitive (pattern) hair loss
root_causes.diagnostic: Receding hairline/crown thinning; family history.

iron_mg.why: low ferritin is a common hair-loss driver

prescription.detail: Finasteride lowers DHT; minoxidil stimulates follicles (both need consistency & medical advice).

root_causes.name: Nutrient deficiency (iron/zinc/protein)
root_causes.diagnostic: Diffuse shedding; low ferritin, low protein, or crash dieting.

iron_mg.why: low ferritin is a common hair-loss driver

prescription.detail: Restore adequate protein/iron/zinc; check ferritin; avoid aggressive deficits.

root_causes.name: Senescence & mitochondrial decline
root_causes.diagnostic: Optimising healthspan; reducing "zombie cell" and mitochondrial aging.

prescription.detail: VO2max and strength are the strongest longevity signals; add sleep, muscle mass, metabolic health.

root_causes.name: Chronic mTOR over-activation
root_causes.diagnostic: Constant surplus/over-feeding; interested in autophagy.

prescription.detail: Balance anabolic (training/protein) with periods of lower feeding to allow autophagy.

root_causes.name: Chronic low-grade inflammation
root_causes.diagnostic: Elevated CRP, aches, slow recovery, "inflammaging".

prescription.detail: Omega-3, colourful plants/fiber, regular movement, sleep; reduce sugar and visceral fat.

root_causes.name: Dysbiosis / low fiber diversity
root_causes.diagnostic: Bloating, irregularity, low plant diversity in diet.

prescription.detail: 30+ plant types/week, fermented foods, soluble + resistant fibers; ease in to avoid bloating.

root_causes.name: Micronutrient gaps / immune resilience
root_causes.diagnostic: Frequent colds, slow recovery, run-down.

prescription.detail: Sleep, vitamin D/zinc sufficiency, moderate exercise; vitamin C/zinc at symptom onset.

root_causes.name: Insufficient stimulus or recovery
root_causes.diagnostic: Gains stalled; training hard but not progressing.

prescription.detail: Add volume/load progressively, 10–20 hard sets/muscle/week, 1.6–2.2 g/kg protein, sleep.

root_causes.name: Neural efficiency + recovery limits
root_causes.diagnostic: Top lifts stuck; grinding reps, poor recovery.

prescription.detail: Lower-rep heavy work, manage fatigue with a deload, ensure recovery/sleep.

root_causes.name: Metabolic adaptation / adherence drift
root_causes.diagnostic: Weight loss stalled despite "the same" diet.

protein_g.why: preserves lean mass in a deficit + satiety

prescription.detail: Re-measure intake/steps, protein high, add resistance to protect BMR; consider a diet break.

root_causes.name: Thin aerobic base / iron status
root_causes.diagnostic: Pace/HR not improving; possible low iron in endurance athletes.

sodium_mg.why: electrolyte for training in SG heat

prescription.detail: 80% easy zone-2 volume + 20% hard intervals; check ferritin; fuel carbs around sessions.

root_causes.name: Low training readiness
root_causes.diagnostic: Flat, unmotivated, underperforming sessions.

prescription.detail: Caffeine 3–6 mg/kg ~45 min pre; citrulline for pump; ensure sleep/hydration underlie it.

root_causes.name: Autonomic imbalance / systemic fatigue
root_causes.diagnostic: Falling performance, high resting HR, poor sleep, irritability.

prescription.detail: Cut volume 40–60% for 1–2 weeks, raise calories/protein, prioritise sleep; then rebuild.
